name: Rohlik MCP Server
what_it_does: Official Rohlik MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with Rohlik — the Czech/Central European online grocery delivery service — searching products, managing shopping carts, placing orders, tracking deliveries, and integrating grocery shopping automation into agent-driven household management and meal planning workflows.
use_cases: Searching and ordering groceries from household management agents
Building automated meal planning and grocery list agents
Tracking Rohlik delivery status from logistics agents
Managing recurring grocery orders from smart home agents
Price comparison for grocery items from cost optimization agents
Integrating grocery shopping into personal assistant workflows from daily planning agents
not_for: Users outside Czech Republic, Slovakia, Hungary, Germany, Austria (Rohlik's markets)
Non-grocery e-commerce (Rohlik focuses on food and household items)
best_when: An agent needs to automate grocery shopping on Rohlik for users in Central Europe — for meal planning, household management, or smart home grocery automation.
avoid_when: You're outside Rohlik's service area, or prefer alternative grocery platforms (Tesco, Kaufland, etc.).

auth.notes: Rohlik account authentication required. OAuth or session-based auth. Account must be registered in one of Rohlik's service markets (CZ, SK, HU, DE, AT).

pricing.free_tier_limits: Rohlik API access free for account holders; grocery purchases at market prices
pricing.paid_tiers: Rohlik Prime subscription for free delivery
pricing.notes: MCP server is free. Grocery orders are real purchases. Rohlik Prime available for subscription delivery benefits.

performance.rate_limits: Rohlik API: reasonable limits for personal account usage

known_agent_gotchas: CRITICAL: Orders placed through MCP result in real financial transactions — implement confirmation step
Service only available in CZ, SK, HU, DE, AT — agents must handle geographic restrictions
Grocery availability and pricing changes frequently — cache TTL should be short
Delivery slots must be available — agents must check slot availability before completing order
Payment must be pre-configured in Rohlik account — MCP cannot add new payment methods
Official Rohlik MCP but niche geography — limited community support outside Central Europe
agent_readiness.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. OAuth auth. GDPR compliant (EU data residency). Real purchase capability — require user confirmation before order placement. Store credentials securely.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS. OAuth. GDPR. Real purchase capability — confirmation required. EU data residency.
